name: storybook
description: Build, preview, and test UI components with Storybook Codex skills.

interface.shortDescription: Build, preview, and test UI components
interface.longDescription: Give Codex Storybook setup, init, and upgrade skills for component development. Use it to prepare projects for Storybook MCP workflows, preview UI in the browser, run story tests, and repair Storybook setup.
defaultPrompt: Run Storybook tests for changed stories
